channel.title: Anti-Pest Solutions | Pest Control Hawkesbury Region NSW on Anti-Pest Solutions
channel.description: Recent content in Anti-Pest Solutions | Pest Control Hawkesbury Region NSW on Anti-Pest Solutions

item.title: European Wasp
item.description:
Whilst doing a routine General Pest Service on a home in Bowen Mountain on Monday, I discovered a European Wasp nest forming inside a cavity of the home.

Luckily for the home owner, I had arrived on the day, as this could have escalated to something much worse over the coming weeks.

This wasp species is dangerous and should be approached with care. Professional pest services should be called.

If you have any issues with pests in and around your home or business, please don’t hesitate to call Josh at Anti-Pest Solutions.

item.title: About Us
item.description:
About Anti-Pest Solutions

Anti-Pest Solutions is an independent, owner-managed pest control business serving the Hawkesbury region and surrounding communities.

Our staff are all highly trained and have many years’ experience eradicating pests from both residential and commercial properties.

Owner/Operator

The business is owned and operated by Josh Herron, who brings extensive qualifications and hands-on experience in pest management to every job.

Our Approach

We develop a customised pest management strategy for every property, designed to eliminate infestations comprehensively. We understand that pest problems are stressful, so we aim to provide swift, professional service that fits around your schedule.

item.title: Commercial Pest Control
item.description:
Commercial Pest Control

When your business reputation is on the line, you need a pest control partner you can rely on - discreet, prompt response times, every time.

Industries We Serve

  • Public offices
  • Food manufacturing
  • Retail
  • Healthcare
  • Transport & logistics
  • Education
  • Hospitality

Pests We Treat

Ants, spiders, bed bugs, birds and bird lice, bees, wasps, rats, stored product pests, and cockroach species.

Our Approach

We work as a partner to your business - rigorous inspections, regular monitoring, and discreet, effective treatments that minimise disruption to your operations.

item.title: Contact Us
item.description:
We are here to help you

Have a pest problem, or just a question? Get in touch for a free consultation - we’ll aim to visit whenever it’s most convenient for you.

item.title: Residential Pest Control
item.description:
Residential Pest Control

Anti-Pest Solutions offers a comprehensive and discreet service for household pest control, with rapid response times and solutions built around you.

Pests We Treat

  • Rodents
  • Spiders
  • Cockroaches
  • Fleas
  • Ants
  • Bed bugs
  • Birds and bird lice
  • Stored product pests (weevils)
  • Bees and wasps

Our Approach

We pest-proof homes through an integrated pest management program that sets out clear responsibilities for both homeowners and technicians - from the initial service through to routine preventative visits - using environmentally sustainable practices throughout.
